holdings.infoBox: QGRO is an equity ETF with a total of 188 individual holdings. The top holdings are T-Mobile US stock at 3.37%, Apple at 3.25%, Eli Lilly and Company at 3.18%, Alphabet at 3.16%, and The TJX Companies at 3.03%.

overview.description: The American Century U.S. Quality Growth ETF (QGRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US stocks screened for growth and quality factors. Holdings are weighted based on a growth score. QGRO was launched on Sep 10, 2018 and is issued by American Century Investments.
infoTable: American Century U.S. Quality Growth Index
